subcodes.first_line: O delicate branch of the divine Lote-Tree! That which thou hadst written was noted and its contents were perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع لطیف از سدره رحمانیه آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ شد و آنچه مسطور بود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
